text.title: Lean Stack Bootstrapper Blueprint Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when lean-stack-bootstrapper-blueprint is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), root cause (`reason`), and corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Indie hacker spends 2 weeks on k8s, ships nothing.
antipattern.note: Fix: Strip k8s, redeploy on Vercel + Supabase in 1 day.

antipattern.description: Monthly bill surprises with $400 charge after viral tweet.
antipattern.note: Fix: Set hard caps in each vendor + Cloudflare worker rate limit.

antipattern.description: CTO insists on portability so all services are containerized + self-hosted.
antipattern.note: Fix: Accept lock-in pre-PMF; revisit at $10k MRR.
